questionHtml: The fluid in the bowel has a similar linear attenuation coefficient as the bowel surface. Gases have much lower linear attenuation coefficients than fluids. Explain why doctors will fill the bowel with air before taking an X-ray image.
markschemeHtml:
to produce an X-ray image there must be constrast/a difference in the intensity of the beam transmitted through tissue and the bowel ✔

introduction of air will produce contrast ✔
